Title: Burns & McDonnell Interview Follow-Up - SignalOps Demo Portal

Summary:
SignalOps Demo Portal is a project built to demonstrate layered data shaping, MLflow-backed experiment tracking, stable serving contracts, and a reviewable frontend surface in one interview artifact.

Canonical public path:
https://targetedwebresults.com/burnsandmcdonnell/

Crawler-friendly pages:
- Overview and full text: https://targetedwebresults.com/burnsandmcdonnell/full-content.html
- Interview handout: https://targetedwebresults.com/burnsandmcdonnell/interview-handout.html
- Interactive site entry: https://targetedwebresults.com/burnsandmcdonnell/

Key topics:
- Project rationale and role-fit mapping
- Medallion-style data flow across source, bronze, silver, gold, experiments, serving, and frontend
- Local MLflow experiment workflow and scoped interpretation
- Masked public contracts and review-surface boundary
- Frontend delivery and target-stack mapping
